text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the school, Satono Diamond
and I pass by the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ooh, they're holding a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That machine... That's the type where you turn
the lever until a ball drops out, right? That's the
best kind of raffle machine!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, since you turn the lever yourself, you have
control over how hard and fast you want the
tumbler to spin.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I like it because it feels like your luck is in your
own hands.
choice_data_list: Do you want to try it out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember receiving a raffle ticket when we were
shopping, so I offer it to her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please! I want to see if I can win the grand
prize!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond gives the tumbler an
extraordinarily spirited spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I... I did it! The grand prize! Trainer, I won the
grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See? I told you I'd win it! Luck is something you
seize with your own hands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wins the grand prize just as she promised. It
feels like she won through sheer determination.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've got a feeling it's going to be a good
year. ♪
choice_data_list: You should go to the hot spring with Kitasan.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm giving this to you, Trainer. It was your
raffle ticket, after all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm just happy I got to spin the tumbler!
choice_data_list: But you're the one who won...
But you're the one who won...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well then, how about we go together?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a great break from work. Yes, that sounds
like a grand idea. It's decided, then!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We can use it to celebrate completing the first
three years of the Twinkle Series! It's important to
mark milestones and show appreciation for each
other, after all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Besides, having a reward for working hard is a
good motivator, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right! Then it's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We promise to use the coupon as a reward once
we successfully get through her senior year with
flying colors.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, a carrot hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I just love how impressive it looks. At home, we
cut up the carrot, so I always look forward to
getting to eat this version with a whole carrot. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Guess what! I can eat the entire steak without the
carrot falling over!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ The secret is at the top of the carrot.
You have to... Well, it will be easier to just show
you. Let's eat it together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Prepared to be amazed by my special skill!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond handles her knife and fork
expertly and gracefully polishes off the
hamburger steak without the carrot toppling
over.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Mm, that was wonderful. It certainly deserves its
"deluxe" title! It was absolutely delicious!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Long ago, I heard of a jinx that says the
direction a hamburger steak carrot falls indicates
where bad luck lies.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I figured there wouldn't be any bad luck around
me if I could eat the steak without the carrot
falling over, so I practiced doing just that.
choice_data_list: You were trying to overcome the jinx?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Everyone is always surprised when I manage
to do it, and it makes for a great conversation
starter. Do you want to try too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond passes on her secret
technique to me, and I learn to eat it without the
carrot falling over.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, we got so many! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please take these home with you. It was
your raffle ticket, after all.
choice_data_list: I don't think I can finish these alone!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm... In that case, I'll split them with the others in
the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just giving them away as-is isn't very fun, so I'll
cook them up first. ♪
choice_data_list: What are you going to make?
What are you going to make?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's something I've been wanting to try
my hand at making—carrot taiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Everyone loves sweet carrot paste, so I'll fill the
taiyaki with that and top them off with grated
carrot.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll knead some carrots into the dough as well and
mix in some carrot chips! That should give the
taiyaki a cute orange color! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
For the final touch, I'll skewer it with a whole
carrot, just like a carrot hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You think so too? If it turns out well, I plan to
propose it as a new dish for the Satono Group's
culinary division. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite feeling somewhat unsure about how
extremely creative the dish is, I offer to help her
with the cooking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Satono Diamond informs me
that the carrot taiyaki was a huge hit among the
Ritto Dorm residents.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just a single carrot... I'm sorry, Trainer. I wasted
your precious raffle ticket...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It seems I didn't try hard enough...
choice_data_list: In that case, eat that carrot and cheer up!
In that case, eat that carrot and cheer up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you sure I can have it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Despite this being the only carrot we won, you're
willing to give such a precious prize to me? Thank
you so much.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This carrot you've gifted me is the only one of its
kind, and it's all mine.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it's the tastiest carrot in the world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just happy to see Satono Diamond smiling so
much, but the raffle clerk sweats nervously under
the pressure of the carrot having to be the
tastiest one in the world.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I didn't... get a prize?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to try again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to accept this! I swear I'll turn these
results around!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Erm... Do you have another raffle ticket?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I don't. Where can I buy one?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You can't buy them. You get them with your
purchases in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So I just have to buy something else, right?! I'll be
right back!
choice_data_list: Hold on! Let's calm down a little!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Don't try to stop me! As an Umamusume of the
Satono family, I cannot run away from this
problem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's just as opposed to bad luck as she
is committed to breaking jinxes. Or maybe she's
taking this way too seriously.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I even have my wallet right he—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears Satono Diamond forgot her wallet in
her dorm room. Thanks to that, I'm able to
dissuade her from trying the raffle again.
